meta.title: AYRADE · Algiers Stock Exchange IPO : 1-30 June 2026
meta.description: AYRADE : Algiers Stock Exchange IPO. Subscription window 1 to 30 June 2026. 800 DZD per share. Sovereign cloud, datacenter integration, sovereign cybersecurity.
meta.ogDescription: AYRADE opens 20% of its capital on the Algiers Stock Exchange from 1 to 30 June 2026, via a 25% capital increase.
meta.titleTeaser: AYRADE · Algiers Stock Exchange IPO : opening 1 June 2026
meta.descriptionTeaser: AYRADE is preparing its IPO on the Algiers Stock Exchange. Opening scheduled 1 June 2026. Sovereign cloud, datacenter integration, sovereign cybersecurity.
meta.ogTitleTeaser: AYRADE · Be Ready : Algiers Stock Exchange IPO
meta.ogDescriptionTeaser: AYRADE will open 20% of its capital on the Algiers Stock Exchange via a 25% capital increase. Opening scheduled 1 June 2026. Limited number of shares.

cookies.title: Your cookies, your choice
cookies.body: This site uses Google Analytics to measure traffic anonymously. No personal data is collected without your consent.

alert.title: Get a notification when subscription opens.
alert.lead: Leave us your e-mail. You'll receive a notification on 1 June 2026 when AYRADE's IPO officially opens, along with the final subscription terms.
alert.consent: I agree that AYRADE may use my e-mail address to notify me of the subscription opening, in accordance with the privacy policy (law 18-07). One-click unsubscribe in every message.

success.title: Check your inbox.
success.body: We've just sent you a confirmation e-mail. Click the link inside to validate your alert request. Without this confirmation, we don't keep any data on you.
success.alreadyBody: You've already confirmed your alert request. You'll receive an e-mail on 1 June 2026 when subscription opens. If you don't see one, check your spam folder or contact support@ayrade.com.

errors.invalid: Please enter a valid e-mail address and accept the privacy policy.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests from this connection. Try again in an hour.
errors.server: Something went wrong, please try again in a moment.

return.confirmed: Your address is confirmed. You'll receive an e-mail on 1 June 2026 at the subscription opening.
return.alreadyConfirmed: This address was already confirmed. You'll receive an e-mail at the opening.
return.unsubscribed: You're unsubscribed. No further notifications will be sent.
return.invalid: The link you used is no longer valid. You can try again below.

hero.title: Your digital sovereignty.
hero.lead: AYRADE opens 20% of its capital on the Algiers Stock Exchange from 1 to 30 June 2026, via a 25% capital increase taking the total share count from 5,000,000 to 6,250,000. Sovereign cloud, datacenter integration, sovereign cybersecurity; AYRADE is building the digital infrastructure that will carry Algeria's next decade of growth.
hero.disclaimer: COSOB visa no. 2026/02 dated 15 April 2026. Full terms of the offering and risk factors are set out in the information notice. Promotional document.
hero.disclaimerTeaser: Offering in preparation with market authorities. Full terms, risk factors and all official information will be set out in the information notice upon its publication. Promotional document.
hero.closedBanner: The subscription period has closed. Results are being processed.
hero.archiveBanner: AYRADE has been listed since 15 July 2026. This page archives the IPO communication.
hero.imageAlt: AYRADE datacenter : editorial view of the server corridor in blue light, evoking compute power and sovereign digital infrastructure.

keyFigures.title: The first IPO by an Algerian sovereign cloud operator.
keyFigures.kpi1Label: Of share capital open to the public
keyFigures.kpi6Sub: Lead manager: Banque de Développement Local
keyFigures.visaBody: Information notice approved by COSOB on 15 April 2026 under no. 2026/02 (Decision CAB/40/2026). Full terms of the offering, risk factors and subscription conditions are set out in this notice.
keyFigures.visaBodyTeaser: The information notice is being finalised with COSOB. It will set out the full terms of the offering, the risk factors and subscription conditions. Publication expected shortly.

pillars.title: An Algerian player specialising in sovereign cloud, datacenter integration and sovereign cybersecurity.
pillars.lead: Founded in 2009 by Mohamed Lamine BELBACHIR, AYRADE operates a digitally sovereign infrastructure from Algeria, serving more than 10,000 Algerian businesses and institutions.
pillars.p1Body: IaaS, PaaS and SaaS operated from Algeria. Data hosted on national territory, under Algerian control, for regulated sectors.
pillars.p2Body: Design, deployment and operation of datacenters integrated by AYRADE teams. Electrical, network and physical cybersecurity engineering, 24/7 monitoring.
pillars.p3Body: Proprietary cybersecurity product designed by AYRADE (Ayrade Security Appliance: ASA). Compliance auditing, penetration testing, resilience of sensitive information systems.

respiration.title: One team, three business lines, seventeen years of industrial building.

thesis.title: Three reasons to subscribe to Algerian digital sovereignty.
thesis.reason1Title: A captive market, already in place
thesis.reason1Body: Three forces converge: infrastructure needs already embedded with Algeria's major operators, mandatory data repatriation under the digital-sovereignty law, and a digital-services market set to triple by 2030. AYRADE is positioned at the crossroads of this captive demand.
thesis.reason2Body: Target dividend yield of 9.5% per year, as disclosed in the information notice, backed by a 100% post-IPO payout policy. Capital appreciation outlook driven by strong market growth. For individual investors, a rare balance between regular income and upside potential.
thesis.reason2BodyTeaser: Target dividend yield of 9.5% per year, backed by a 100% post-IPO payout policy. Capital appreciation outlook driven by strong market growth. For individual investors, a rare balance between regular income and upside potential.
thesis.reason3Title: An industrial player aligned with national strategy
thesis.reason3Body: 17 years of activity, 2 operational datacenters, 10,000+ clients, ISO 9001 certification. AYRADE already serves the critical sectors of the Algerian economy on issues (data sovereignty, local hosting, cybersecurity under national control) that benefit from institutional support.

strategy.title: A three-year, fully costed industrial plan to fund the next phase of deployment.
strategy.lead: Net proceeds from the IPO (958.5 million dinars) are allocated to an investment and launch programme that is already detailed in the COSOB prospectus, year by year. Three growth engines drive the 2026-2031 business plan.
strategy.leadTeaser: Net proceeds from the IPO (958.5 million dinars) are allocated to an investment and launch programme costed year by year. Three growth engines drive the 2026-2031 business plan.
strategy.blockAmeta: 958.5 M DZD net : 1,000 M DZD gross issuance
strategy.aCapexTitle: Deployment of Tier 3 data centres and core-infrastructure modernisation
strategy.aCapexBody: Upgrade to Tier 3 data centres, with modernisation of core equipment (servers, switches, routers, firewalls). Goal: increase processing capacity, ensure the resilience required by regulated sectors, and support scale-up of EPC and Cloud projects.
strategy.aBfrTitle: Launch of new projects and balance-sheet strengthening
strategy.aBfrBody: OPEX for the first three months of new EPC project ramp-up (consumables, payroll, training, travel), marketing spend for new activities, and reinforcement of the Company's financial structure.
strategy.bu1Body: B2G projects (first contract with a security institution already awarded at 628 M DZD), renewable high-cap portfolio, mid & low-cap ramp-up, data-centre engineering and recurring maintenance contracts representing 20% of annual EPC revenue.
strategy.bu2Body: Local cloud and hosting under ARPCE authorisation 01/RM/2024, Microsoft 365, licences, ERP integration, maintenance contracts and managed services. Cloud & Hosting alone grows from 85 to 708 M DZD over the period.
strategy.bu3Body: Offering built around ASA (Ayrade Security Appliance), AYRADE's in-house cybersecurity product delivering compliance auditing, penetration testing and resilience of sensitive information systems. Commercialised as hardware, renewable annual licences and 24/7 managed services. Direct answer to Law 18-07 and the National Information Security Framework (RNSI).
strategy.blockCmeta: 593 M DZD in total : phasing validated in COSOB prospectus
strategy.blockCmetaTeaser: 593 M DZD in total : industrial phasing 2026-2028
strategy.j1Detail: First Tier 3 upgrade wave : data-centre commissioning to Tier 3 standards, deployment of new servers and switches to absorb the load from EPC and Cloud projects.
strategy.j2Detail: Continued Tier 3 extension : additional servers, reinforcement of routers, switches and firewalls, aligned with the operational launch of the new Cybersecurity BU.
strategy.j3Detail: Tier 3 fleet consolidation : full network redundancy, firewalls and routers at 2028 target. Infrastructure ready for the next decade.
strategy.footer: The full use-of-proceeds plan and the 2026-2031 business plan are detailed in the COSOB prospectus, Chapter VI, Sections 6.2.3 (Investment policy) and 6.2.4 (Outlook).
strategy.footerTeaser: The full use-of-proceeds plan and the 2026-2031 business plan will be detailed in the COSOB information notice upon its publication.

trajectory.title: Seventeen years of industrial build. A decade of charted growth.
trajectory.lead: From the 2009 founding to the 2026 public listing, AYRADE approaches its IPO with a demonstrated operating base and a 2026-2031 business plan fully disclosed in the COSOB notice.
trajectory.leadTeaser: From the 2009 founding to the 2026 public listing, AYRADE approaches its IPO with a demonstrated operating base and a costed 2026-2031 business plan.
trajectory.a3Sub: 2nd player in the Algerian cloud market
trajectory.certificationsList: ISO 9001 · ARPCE general authorisation 01/RM/2024 (Cloud Computing & hosting) · Import licence for sensitive IT equipment
trajectory.cagrEBITDASub: From 365 to 1,504 M DZD : margin 22% to 33%
trajectory.cagrRNSub: From 240 to 1,063 M DZD : net margin 14% to 23%
trajectory.sourceChart: Source : AYRADE business plan, COSOB Information Notice, Chapter VI §6.2.4. 2022-2024 financials audited ; 2025 closed 31/12/2025, not yet audited as of the notice filing.
trajectory.sourceChartTeaser: Source : AYRADE business plan. 2022-2024 financials audited ; 2025 closed 31/12/2025.
trajectory.c3Sub: Cumulative free cash flow turns positive in 2028
trajectory.sourceFinance: Source : KPMG valuation report. WACC 15.97% · Terminal growth 2% · Dividend policy : 100% of net income post-IPO.
trajectory.sourceFinanceTeaser: Source : KPMG valuation report. Dividend policy : 100% of net income post-IPO.
trajectory.disclaimer: The forecasts in this section rest on assumptions whose realisation is inherently uncertain. A sensitivity analysis is included in the valuation report attached to the COSOB notice. Past performance is not indicative of future results.
trajectory.disclaimerTeaser: The forecasts in this section rest on assumptions whose realisation is inherently uncertain. Past performance is not indicative of future results.

howTo.title: Three steps to take part in the offering.
howTo.step1Body: With one of the banking syndicate member banks (BDL lead manager + 10 other institutions).
howTo.step1BodyTeaser: With one of the banking syndicate member banks. The full list will be communicated before 1 June 2026.
howTo.step2Body: Complete the subscription form between 1 and 30 June 2026. Minimum and maximum subscription amounts are specified in the notice.
howTo.step2BodyTeaser: Complete the subscription form between 1 and 30 June 2026. The full terms (minimum, maximum, documents) will be specified in the information notice.
howTo.step3Body: Allocation and settlement-delivery according to the schedule set out in the notice. Listing on the Algiers Stock Exchange at the conclusion of the offering.
howTo.step3BodyTeaser: Allocation and settlement-delivery according to the schedule that will be set out in the notice. Listing on the Algiers Stock Exchange at the conclusion of the offering.

citation.quote: « As the first Algerian sovereign cloud operator to go public, AYRADE opens its capital in a digital services market set to triple by 2030. We invite Algerian investors to take part, from June 2026, in the sovereign digital infrastructure that will carry the country's next decade of growth. »
citation.name: Mohamed Lamine BELBACHIR

asa.title: Meet the AYRADE shield for critical infrastructure.
asa.lead: ASA is AYRADE's in-house cybersecurity product. Compliance auditing, penetration testing, resilience of sensitive information systems: the device inspects infrastructure from every angle (systems, applications, networks, ports, protocols) and simulates real-world attacks to validate the actual resilience of defenses. An industrial asset already embedded in the 2026-2031 business plan, at the core of the Cybersecurity BU.
asa.visualAlt: Placeholder for the AYRADE Security Appliance visual.
asa.cap1Body: Full attack-surface mapping: systems, applications, networks, ports, protocols. Nothing escapes the scan.
asa.cap2Body: DDoS, malware, botnets, protocol exploits. ASA puts your defenses to the test before attackers do.
asa.cap3Body: Prioritized vulnerabilities, quantified impact, remediation plans. Deliverables that security teams and executive committees can act on directly.
asa.cap4Body: The equivalent of an expert audit team permanently deployed across your infrastructure, without interruption.
asa.quote: "A genuine shield for enterprises. Its mission: audit the infrastructure from every angle and test the resilience of your security continuously, 24/7."
asa.quoteAttribution: Mohamed Lamine BELBACHIR, Founder of AYRADE

dataRoom.title: To learn more or to subscribe.

faq.title: Ten questions to understand the AYRADE IPO.
faq.lead: Concise answers drawn from the information notice approved by the COSOB (Visa no. 2026/02 of April 15, 2026, Decision CAB/40/2026). On every topic, the notice remains the reference document.
faq.leadTeaser: Concise answers to understand the AYRADE IPO. The information notice approved by the COSOB will be the reference document ; it will be published shortly.
faq.q1Title: Who can subscribe to the AYRADE IPO?
faq.q1Body: The offering is open to all individuals and legal entities, whether resident in Algeria or not, under the conditions set out in the information notice. Algerian legal entities may subscribe subject to their corporate purpose and applicable regulations.
faq.q1BodyTeaser: The offering will be open to all individuals and legal entities, whether resident in Algeria or not, under the conditions that will be set out in the information notice. Algerian legal entities will be able to subscribe subject to their corporate purpose and applicable regulations.
faq.q2Body: Subscription is a four-step process: collect the subscription form from a bank in the placement syndicate or download it from this website; open (or use) a securities account with an authorized Stock Exchange Intermediary (IOB); submit the form together with payment; receive the allocation notice at the end of the period.
faq.q2BodyTeaser: Subscription will be a four-step process : collect the subscription form from a bank in the placement syndicate ; open (or use) a securities account with an authorized Stock Exchange Intermediary (IOB) ; submit the form together with payment ; receive the allocation notice at the end of the period. The full terms will be specified in the information notice.
faq.q3Body: The opening period is set out in the COSOB-approved notice and relayed on this site's home page. If the offering closes early, a public notice will be issued through official channels.
faq.q3BodyTeaser: The subscription window is scheduled from 1 to 30 June 2026. Final dates will be confirmed by the information notice. If the offering closes early, a public notice will be issued through official channels.
faq.q4Title: What is the share price and the minimum investment?
faq.q4Body: The price per share, the number of shares offered and the minimum number of shares per form are all set out in the information notice. See Chapter IV of the COSOB notice for the full terms of the offering.
faq.q4BodyTeaser: The price per share has been set at 800 DZD. The number of shares offered, the minimum number of shares per form and the full terms of the offering will be set out in the information notice upon its publication.
faq.q5Body: AYRADE communicates a target dividend yield of 9.5% per year, backed by a 100% post-IPO distribution policy of distributable net income. This target yield is not a contractual undertaking: dividends actually paid will depend on annual results and will be subject to approval by the General Meeting.
faq.q6Title: When and how are dividends paid?
faq.q6Body: Dividends are proposed each year by the Board of Directors and voted by the Ordinary General Meeting. They are then paid through your securities-account intermediary, following standard market procedures.
faq.q7Title: Where and how can I sell the shares after the IPO?
faq.q7Body: AYRADE shares will be listed on the Growth Market of the Algiers Stock Exchange (SGBV). You can buy and sell at any time through your IOB, during market hours, at the prevailing market price.
faq.q8Title: What risks are associated with the investment?
faq.q8Body: Any investment in securities carries risks (market risk, liquidity risk, risks specific to the issuer and its sector). Chapter V of the information notice details the risk factors. The share price may rise or fall. Past dividends do not guarantee future dividends.
faq.q8BodyTeaser: Any investment in securities carries risks (market risk, liquidity risk, risks specific to the issuer and its sector). The detailed risk factors will be set out in the information notice. The share price may rise or fall. Past dividends do not guarantee future dividends.
faq.q9Title: Where can I find the information notice and official documents?
faq.q9Body: The COSOB-approved information notice is available for download from this site (Documents section) and from the COSOB and the syndicate banks. It is the reference document for the offering; everything this site says points back to it.
faq.q10Title: What does the COSOB visa mean?
faq.q10Body: Visa no. 2026/02, granted by the COSOB on April 15, 2026, does not constitute a recommendation to subscribe. It only means that the information provided in the notice appears truthful and sufficient for the potential investor to make an informed decision.
faq.q10BodyTeaser: The COSOB visa, when it is granted to the information notice of the offering, will not constitute a recommendation to subscribe. It will only mean that the information provided in the notice appears truthful and sufficient for the potential investor to make an informed decision.
faq.contactBody: Our Investor Relations team answers individual and institutional investors at

footer.tagline: Sovereign cloud, datacenter integration, sovereign cybersecurity. Registered office: Algiers, Algeria.
footer.disclaimer1: The COSOB visa cannot be construed as a recommendation to subscribe to or purchase the securities offered. It does not entail any judgement or assessment of the proposed transaction. It means only that the information provided in the approved information notice appears truthful and sufficient for a potential investor to make their decision.
footer.disclaimer1Teaser: The COSOB visa, when it is granted to the information notice of the offering, cannot be construed as a recommendation to subscribe to or purchase the securities offered. It will not entail any judgement or assessment of the proposed transaction. It will mean only that the information provided in the approved information notice appears truthful and sufficient for a potential investor to make their decision.
footer.disclaimer2: Potential investors are cautioned that investing in securities involves risks, and that the value of the investment may rise or fall under the influence of factors internal or external to the issuer. Past dividends are not a guarantee of future income.

legalNotice.title: Publisher and hosting information for this website.
legalNotice.lead: This website is published in connection with the AYRADE IPO, approved by the COSOB under Visa no. 2026/02 dated April 15, 2026 (Decision CAB/40/2026). It consistently points back to the approved information notice, which remains the reference document for the offering.
legalNotice.leadTeaser: This website is published in the context of the preparation of the AYRADE IPO. It will be updated to point back to the information notice approved by the COSOB upon its publication, which will be the reference document for the offering.
legalNotice.s1Body: The website ipo.ayrade.com is published by AYRADE SpA, a société par actions incorporated under Algerian law, registered with the Commercial Register of the Wilaya of Algiers under number 09B1002433 — 16/01, with a share capital of DZD 25,000,000. Registered office: Centre des affaires Djenina, Groupe 10, Section 11, Lot 1255 and 1254, 7th floor, Algiers, Algeria. Phone: +213 23 80 45 41 Corporate website: https://www.ayrade.com
legalNotice.s2Body: Mr. Mohamed Lamine BELBACHIR, in his capacity as founder and executive of AYRADE SpA, acts as publication director of the website.
legalNotice.s3Body: The website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA. Website: https://vercel.com.
legalNotice.s4Body:
All elements of this website (text, images, photographs, logos, graphic elements, visual identity, page architecture) are protected by intellectual property law. These elements are the exclusive property of AYRADE SpA or its rights holders. Any reproduction, representation, dissemination or exploitation, in whole or in part, by any means and on any medium, is prohibited without AYRADE's prior written consent.

The “AYRADE” trademark and related logo are the property of AYRADE SpA.
legalNotice.s5Title: 5. Purpose of the website and published information
legalNotice.s5Body:
This website presents the AYRADE IPO and aims to make the offering easier to understand for individual and institutional investors. The information published is concise and consistently refers back to the information notice approved by the COSOB, which remains the reference document.

This website does not constitute an offer, a solicitation or investment advice. Any investment in securities carries risks; investors are invited to review the information notice, in particular Chapter V on risk factors, before making any decision.
legalNotice.s5BodyTeaser:
This website presents the AYRADE IPO and aims to make the offering easier to understand for individual and institutional investors. The information published is concise and will point back to the information notice approved by the COSOB upon its publication, which will be the reference document.

This website does not constitute an offer, a solicitation or investment advice. Any investment in securities carries risks ; investors will be invited to review the information notice, in particular its chapter on risk factors, before making any decision.
legalNotice.s6Body: The website may contain links to third-party sites (syndicate banks, COSOB, SGBV, public institutions). AYRADE exercises no control over these sites and accepts no responsibility for their content or the use that may be made of them. Deep linking to pages on ipo.ayrade.com is permitted provided it does not harm the image and interests of AYRADE.
legalNotice.s6BodyTeaser: The website may contain links to third-party sites (COSOB, SGBV, public institutions). AYRADE exercises no control over these sites and accepts no responsibility for their content or the use that may be made of them. Deep linking to pages on ipo.ayrade.com is permitted provided it does not harm the image and interests of AYRADE.
legalNotice.s7Body: This website and these legal notices are governed by Algerian law. Any dispute relating to the use of the website shall fall within the exclusive jurisdiction of the Algerian courts.

privacyPolicy.title: Processing of personal data collected through this website.
privacyPolicy.lead: AYRADE SpA attaches particular importance to the protection of personal data. This policy sets out the information collected, its purpose, the legal basis for processing and the rights of data subjects, in accordance with Act no. 18-07 of June 10, 2018 on the protection of individuals with regard to the processing of personal data.
privacyPolicy.s1Body: The data controller is AYRADE SpA, registered with the Commercial Register of the Wilaya of Algiers under number 09B1002433 — 16/01, with its registered office at Centre des affaires Djenina, Groupe 10, Section 11, Lot 1255 and 1254, 7th floor, Algiers, Algeria.
privacyPolicy.s2Body:
The website collects two categories of data:

• Data entered by the user in the investor contact form (last name, first name, email, phone, message).

• Browsing data generated automatically when the site is consulted (truncated IP address, browser type, pages viewed, time stamps), for audience measurement and service security purposes.
privacyPolicy.s3Body:
The data collected is used to: answer investor information requests; communicate on the steps of the IPO; ensure the security, performance and continuity of the website; produce anonymized audience statistics.

Data is not sold, transferred or rented to third parties for commercial purposes.
privacyPolicy.s4Body:
Processing is based, depending on the case, on: the performance of a pre-contractual step (information requests); the user's consent (optional forms, non-essential cookies); AYRADE's legitimate interest (security and improvement of the service).

Investor contact data is kept for as long as necessary to process the request, then archived for a maximum of three years from the last exchange. Browsing data is kept for thirteen months.
privacyPolicy.s5Body: Data is accessible only to authorized AYRADE departments (Investor Relations, Communications, IT) and, where applicable, to AYRADE's advisors as part of the offering (syndicate banks, legal counsel, IOB) and to the market authority (COSOB), strictly within the scope of their legal and regulatory duties.
privacyPolicy.s5BodyTeaser: Data is accessible only to authorized AYRADE departments (Investor Relations, Communications, IT) and, where applicable, to AYRADE's advisors as part of the offering (legal counsel, IOB) and to the market authority (COSOB), strictly within the scope of their legal and regulatory duties.
privacyPolicy.s6Body: In accordance with Act 18-07, you have a right of access, rectification, objection, erasure and restriction of processing concerning your personal data. These rights may be exercised at any time by post to the registered office, to the attention of the Data Controller, or by email to support@ayrade.com. You will receive a response within a reasonable time. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Algerian National Authority for the Protection of Personal Data (ANPDP).
privacyPolicy.s7Body:
The website uses a limited number of cookies and similar technologies:

• Cookies strictly necessary for the website to function (language preference, session).

• Anonymized audience-measurement cookies, which track traffic in an aggregated manner.

Non-essential cookies are only set after your consent has been obtained. You can change your choices at any time via your browser settings.
privacyPolicy.s8Body:
AYRADE implements appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure the security and confidentiality of the data processed, consistent with its positioning as a digital-sovereignty operator.

This policy may be updated at any time to reflect changes to the website, the services offered or the legal framework. The date of the latest update is shown at the top of this document.

beReady.title: AYRADE will open 20% of its capital on the Algiers Stock Exchange via a 25% capital increase. Limited number of shares.
beReady.body: The subscription window is scheduled to open on 1 June 2026. The final terms, the banking syndicate and the COSOB-approved information notice will be communicated shortly.
beReady.consent: I agree that AYRADE may use my email address to notify me of the subscription opening, in accordance with the privacy policy.
